# Okta Expression Language (OEL) reference corpus.
#
# Verbatim example expressions collected from Okta's documentation, for use as
# encode/format/validate/decode test fixtures. Lines beginning with `#` are
# comments or `## section` headers; blank lines are ignored; every other line
# is one expression, copied as-written (quoting and casing preserved).
#
# Sections are grouped by construct. The whole corpus parses (and oelencode can
# emit all of it) with the parser the provider references. The SUPPORTED /
# NEEDS-UPSTREAM tag is historical: it records whether the construct was in the
# original upstream parser (SUPPORTED) or was added by our fork
# (NEEDS-UPSTREAM, i.e. the constructs to contribute back upstream). The tag is
# informational; TestCorpusParses asserts every line below actually parses.
#
# Primary sources:
#   https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/okta-expression-language/
#   https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/okta-expression-language-in-identity-engine/
#   https://help.okta.com/en-us/content/topics/users-groups-profiles/usgp-create-group-rules.htm
#   https://help.okta.com/en-us/content/topics/users-groups-profiles/usgp-attribute-mappings-expressions.htm
#   https://help.okta.com/oie/en-us/content/topics/identity-governance/access-certification/iga-el-examples.htm
#   https://help.okta.com/oie/en-us/content/topics/identity-governance/em/policy-rule-el-examples.htm
#   https://help.okta.com/oie/en-us/content/topics/identity-engine/devices/el-device-attributes.htm
#   github.com/okta/terraform-provider-okta (examples/resources/okta_group_rule)

## comparison-logical  [SUPPORTED]
user.city == "San Francisco"
user.salary > 1000000
user.salary >= 1000000
!user.isContractor
user.salary > 1000000 AND !user.isContractor
user.department == "Sales" AND user.city == "New York"
user.status == 'ACTIVE' or user.status == 'PASSWORD_EXPIRED' or user.status == 'LOCKED_OUT' or user.status == 'RECOVERY'
user.employeeNumber == null
user.employeeNumber == ""
user.realmId == "o4cbj6ybZl1QShj0g7"

## string-functions-namespaced  [SUPPORTED]
String.stringContains(user.department, "Sales")
String.stringContains(user.department,"Business Technology")
String.startsWith(user.firstName,"andy")
String.startsWith(user.firstName,String.toLowerCase("bob"))
String.append("This is", " a test")
String.join(",", "This", "is", "a", "test")
String.len("This")
String.removeSpaces("This is a test")
String.replace("This is a test", "is", "at")
String.replaceFirst("This is a test", "is", "at")
String.substring("This is a test", 2, 9)
String.substringAfter("abc@okta.com", "@")
String.substringBefore("abc@okta.com", "@")
String.toUpperCase("This")
String.toLowerCase("ThiS")
String.stringSwitch("This is a test", "default", "test", "value1")

## array-functions-namespaced  [SUPPORTED]
Arrays.contains({10, 20, 30}, 10)
Arrays.size({10, 20, 30})
Arrays.add(user.arrayAttribute, 40)
Arrays.remove(user.arrayAttribute, 20)
Arrays.isEmpty({10, 20})
Arrays.toCsvString({"This", "is", " a ", "test"})
Arrays.get({0, 1, 2}, 0)
Arrays.flatten(10, {20, 30}, 40)

## conversion-functions-namespaced  [SUPPORTED]
Iso3166Convert.toAlpha2("IND")
Iso3166Convert.toAlpha3("840")
Iso3166Convert.toNumeric("USA")
Iso3166Convert.toName("IN")

## group-membership-bare  [SUPPORTED]
isMemberOfGroupName("group1")
isMemberOfGroup("groupId")
isMemberOfAnyGroup("groupId1", "groupId2", "groupId3")
isMemberOfGroupNameStartsWith("San Fr")
isMemberOfGroupNameContains("admin")
isMemberOfGroupNameRegex("/.*admin.*/")

## ternary-concatenation  [SUPPORTED]
user.groupCode == 123 ? 'Sales' : 'Other'
user.firstName + user.lastName
user.firstName + "." + user.lastName
user.employeeNumber != "" AND user.employeeNumber != null ? user.employeeNumber : user.nonEmployeeNumber

## real-world-group-rules  [SUPPORTED]
String.startsWith(user.firstName,String.toLowerCase("bOb"))
isMemberOfAnyGroup("00gb4o8b4kFEKqzMI0h7")
String.stringContains(user.email, "@example.com")
user.Location == "Remote" AND user.workerType == "Employee" AND user.department == "Engineering" AND user.active

## method-calls-classic  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.getInternalProperty("status")
user.getInternalProperty("status") == "ACTIVE"
user.getLinkedObject("manager").lastName
user.getGroups({'group.profile.name': 'Engineering.*'})

## bare-functions  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
substringBefore(user.email, '@')
substringAfter(user.email, '@')
toUpperCase(source.firstName)
getManagerUser("active_directory").firstName
getManagerAppUser("active_directory", "google").firstName
getAssistantUser("active_directory").firstName
hasDirectoryUser()
findDirectoryUser().managerUpn
hasWorkdayUser() ? findWorkdayUser().employeeID : null

## symbolic-operators  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
security.behaviors.contains('New IP') && security.behaviors.contains('New Device')
user.profile.isContractor || user.created.withinSeconds(0)

## elvis  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
Groups.startsWith("OKTA", "TEST", 100) ?: {}

## indexing  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.arrayProperty[0]
{1, 2, 3}[0]

# The matches operator is deprecated by Okta; kept here for round-tripping existing expressions.
## matches-regex  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.title matches '(?i)engineer'
user.department matches "California-[a-zA-Z]+-Sales"

## identity-engine-method-dialect  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.profile.firstName.toUpperCase()
user.profile.firstName.substring(1,3)
user.profile.email.substringBefore('@')
user.profile.email.substringAfter('@')
'hello'.replaceFirst('l', 'p')
'This is a test'.contains('test')
user.profile.strArray.size()
user.profile.intArray.contains(0)
user.profile.stringDouble.toInteger()
'USA'.parseCountryCode().toAlpha2()
DateTime.now()
DateTime.now().toUnix()
user.created.plusDays(2)
user.created.withinDays(1)
user.created.toString('MM/dd/yyyy')
Time.now("EST", "YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
Time.now().toZone('Asia/Tokyo')

## group-membership-object  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.isMemberOf({'group.profile.name': 'West Coast Users', 'operator': 'EXACT'})
user.isMemberOf({'group.profile.name': 'West Coast', 'operator': 'STARTS_WITH'})
user.isMemberOf({'group.id': '00gjitX9HqABSoqTB0g3'})
user.isMemberOf({'group.id': {'00gjitX9HqABSoqTB0g3', '00garwpuyxHaWOkdV0g4'}})
user.isMemberOf({'group.id': '00gjitX9HqABSoqTB0g3'}) && user.isMemberOf({'group.id': '00garwpuyxHaWOkdV0g4'})
!user.isMemberOf({'group.profile.name': 'West Coast Users', 'operator': 'EXACT'})

## collection-projection  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.getGroups({'group.profile.name': 'Everyone'}).![profile.name]
user.getGroups({"group.profile.name": "Everyone", "operator": "STARTS_WITH"}).![name]
user.findGroupAndGetOwners({'group.id': 'groupId'}, 'USER')[0]

## iga-governance  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
user.realmId == "o4cbj6ybZl1QShj0g7" OR user.realmId == "guo4c8usniIlFgluO0g7" OR user.realmId == "guo4c7skrkbxDgJ140g7"
user.profile.department == "Human Resources" ? user.profile.managerId : "jsmith@example.com"
user.isMemberOf({'group.profile.name': 'West Coast Users', 'operator': 'EXACT'}) ? "westcoastreviewer@example.com" : "otherreviewer@example.com"
user.profile.department != null && user.profile.department == "Finance Department"
user.profile.department != null && user.profile.department.contains("Finance")
user.status == 'ACTIVE' && user.profile.department == "Help Desk"

## policy-conditions-device-security  [NEEDS-UPSTREAM]
device.profile.registered == true && device.profile.managed == true && device.profile.secureHardwarePresent == true
device.provider.zta.overall <= 60
device.provider.wsc.fireWall == "GOOD"
security.risk.level == 'HIGH'
security.risk.level != 'LOW'
device.provider.oktaVerify.version.versionGreaterThan('9.43') == true
